name: Build your kingdom
description:
Welcome to build your kingdom

Be the strongest kingdom

Do whatever you want

Here some of the guides so you can understand it better

(The corrupt forest - the corrupt forest is a toxic and only Evil can live in it, if an passive or good person try to enter it they become weak every second, and all the animal here are hostile and only few plants can thrive there.)

(Holy land - Holy land is a land where god blessed everything in there, crops grow fast there and almost all the animal there are passive.)

(The cold land - the cold land is an icy cold place where crops cannot grow, the only food source there are fish and animals, but hey the cold land is a place full of caves and materials)

(The middle - The middle is founded in the middle of the world, its a normal place, where there are hostile and passive animals there)

(The wood land - the wood land is a place where trees are massive and plants thriving, also there are poisonous berries and plants there so be careful when picking)

Here is the people you can negotiate to become your citizen

(Humans - you can find at 'The middle' or at the 'Holy land')

(Forest elves - you can find at 'The woodland')

(Dark elves - you can find at the 'The corrupt forest')

(Dwarfs - you can at the 'Holy land' or 'The middle' or 'The cold land')

(Demi humans - you can at the 'The wood land' or 'The cold land')

Each creature can only live in specific places

They will die if they tried

Here's some mechanics

(Population - Population determine how many people are living in your kingdom)

(Food - food will help your citizens to live, without food one by one your citizen will die and also will reduce their trust and happiness)

(Trust - trust is will determine if your citizen trust you if it reaches 0% Your citizen will start a revolution against you)

(Citizen happiness - citizen happiness determine if your citizen is happy with your works, if it reaches 5% your citizen will leave your kingdom reducing your population one by one)

(Days - is how much day you spent making your kingdom)

(Allies - determine who is a kingdoms allies)

(Enemies - Enemies will try to destroy or conquer you land so make sure you improve your military power)

(Status - Status indicate what you are ,once you have picked your status all of your citizen will have the same status. Only there are three status Evil, Passive and Good)

The Evil status can live fine in the corrupt forest and immune to poison, they also have a dark magic

The good status can purify any alignment with their holy magic

The passive status can trade with other kingdom without any casualties accept if they tried to trade with an enemy they will get rejected, they can use elemental magics

If the stats aren't showing please reroll the message
creator: Four eyes
